seoTitle: Herron vs Hester Brook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Herron vs Hester Brook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Herron and Hester Brook.
heading: Herron vs Hester Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Herron, Western Australia and Hester Brook, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hester Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Herron (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Herron or Hester Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Herron has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Hester Brook scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Herron scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Hester Brook scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Herron or Hester Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hester Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
